## What Changed?

Explain the user-visible change in plain language.

## Why?

Who does this help, and what were they unable to do before?

## How Was It Checked?

- [ ] I served the site locally and checked the changed flow.
- [ ] I checked both desktop and mobile if the page layout changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate`.
- [ ] I checked a Vercel preview or ran `npm exec -- vercel build --prod --yes` from a linked checkout for production-facing code.
- [ ] I updated the README or docs if setup or behaviour changed.
- [ ] I used only fictional or approved public sample material.
- [ ] I did not commit passwords, tokens, `.env` files or private artist material.

## Screenshots

Add before-and-after screenshots for visual changes. Remove private details first.
